The '''''Bayonet''-class light cruiser''' was a small [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] built by [[Sienar Fleet Systems/Legends|Sienar Fleet Systems]] and used in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Characteristics==
Armed with eight heavy [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], six [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], and two [[Tractor beam/Legends|tractor beam]] projectors, they served well as patrol craft and were capable of intercepting small transport craft. Using the [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] and planetary probe carried onboard, they were also occasionally used for survey missions.

==History==
''Bayonet''-class vessels were in use during the early days of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and by the time of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] they were considered outdated. They remained in use for duties that did not require a larger or more capable craft, especially in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] and [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].
